headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Stock Could Be 23% Below Fair Value After Europe Digital Bank Push
summary: Interest in JPMorgan Chase (JPM) stock has picked up after management outlined plans to expand the Chase digital bank into at least five European markets, including France, Spain and Italy, over five years. See our latest analysis for JPMorgan Chase. The Chase digital expansion headlines arrive during a period of firm momentum for JPMorgan Chase, with a 7-day share price return of 7.87% and a 30-day share price return of 10.88%, while the 1-year total shareholder return of 24.09% and 5-year...

headline: Inside the Chaotic Iran Talks That Let Trump Claim Victory, But Not Yet Peace
summary: (Bloomberg) -- It was fight night on the White House lawn. Beneath a great steel canopy nicknamed “the Claw,” Justin Gaethje did a backflip off the caged ring in the center of the South Lawn after winning the Ultimate Fighting Championship title card. In the audience, the president, newly 80, had just announced that the Iran war was over, and the Strait of Hormuz was open.Most Read from BloombergRead the 14-Point Draft Memorandum Between the US and IranModi Warns of ‘Shortage of Trust’ Ahead of

headline: Ares Commercial Real Estate (ACRE) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift On Split Analyst Views
summary: Ares Commercial Real Estate is back in focus as analysts refresh their models and set a new fair value price target of US$5.30 per share, compared with prior figures around US$5.25 and US$5.50. This shift sits alongside a split set of Street opinions, with some analysts pointing to book value support and dividend stability, while others emphasize ongoing credit resolution risk and recent cuts from earlier targets such as US$6 and the US$0.50 move cited by JPMorgan. As you read on, you will...

headline: Travis Perkins (LSE:TPK) Stock Fair Value Edges Lower After Analyst Target Cuts
summary: The fair value estimate for Travis Perkins has been nudged lower from £6.62 to £6.55, a shift that aligns with recent trims to analyst price targets in the mid £6 range. These changes sit alongside moves such as JPMorgan’s adjustment to £6.30, underscoring a more cautious tone on how much investors might pay for the stock while ratings like Equal Weight and Overweight remain in place. Read on to see what this evolving target range means for how you track the Travis Perkins story from...
